property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Java\jdk-17\bin;C:\Windows\Sun\Java\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Java\jdk-17\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\ApacheMaven\apache-maven-3.9.14-bin\apache-maven-3.9.14\bin;C:\Users\UserPC\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA 2024.3.2.2\bin;;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA Community Edition 2024.3.3\bin;;C:\Users\UserPC\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\bin;.

testcase.name: saveUser
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS users Таблица users удалена или не существовала Hibernate: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (id BIGINT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, last_name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, age TINYINT NOT NULL) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 Таблица users создана или уже существует Hibernate: insert into users (age, last_name, name) values (?, ?, ?) User с именем Ivan добавлен в базу данных Hibernate: select user0_.id as id1_0_, user0_.age as age2_0_, user0_.last_name as last_nam3_0_, user0_.name as name4_0_ from users user0_
testcase.system-err: апр. 05, 2026 12:27:56 AM org.hibernate.Version logVersion INFO: HHH000412: Hibernate ORM core version 5.6.15.Final апр. 05, 2026 12:27:56 AM org.hibernate.annotations.common.reflection.java.JavaReflectionManager <clinit> INFO: HCANN000001: Hibernate Commons Annotations {5.1.2.Final} апр. 05, 2026 12:27:56 AM org.hibernate.engine.jdbc.connections.internal.DriverManagerConnectionProviderImpl configure WARN: HHH10001002: Using Hibernate built-in connection pool (not for production use!) апр. 05, 2026 12:27:56 AM org.hibernate.engine.jdbc.connections.internal.DriverManagerConnectionProviderImpl buildCreator INFO: HHH10001005: using driver [com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver] at URL [jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/mydb?useSSL=false&serverTimezone=UTC&useUnicode=true&characterEncoding=UTF-8] апр. 05, 2026 12:27:56 AM org.hibernate.engine.jdbc.connections.internal.DriverManagerConnectionProviderImpl buildCreator INFO: HHH10001001: Connection properties: {password=****, useUnicode=true, characterEncoding=UTF-8, user=root} апр. 05, 2026 12:27:56 AM org.hibernate.engine.jdbc.connections.internal.DriverManagerConnectionProviderImpl buildCreator INFO: HHH10001003: Autocommit mode: false апр. 05, 2026 12:27:56 AM org.hibernate.engine.jdbc.connections.internal.DriverManagerConnectionProviderImpl$PooledConnections <init> INFO: HHH000115: Hibernate connection pool size: 20 (min=1) апр. 05, 2026 12:27:56 AM org.hibernate.dialect.Dialect <init> INFO: HHH000400: Using dialect: org.hibernate.dialect.MySQL8Dialect

testcase.name: removeUserById
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS users Таблица users удалена или не существовала Hibernate: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (id BIGINT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, last_name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, age TINYINT NOT NULL) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 Таблица users создана или уже существует Hibernate: insert into users (age, last_name, name) values (?, ?, ?) User с именем Ivan добавлен в базу данных Hibernate: select user0_.id as id1_0_0_, user0_.age as age2_0_0_, user0_.last_name as last_nam3_0_0_, user0_.name as name4_0_0_ from users user0_ where user0_.id=? User с id 1 удален Hibernate: delete from users where id=?

testcase.system-out: Hibernate: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS users Таблица users удалена или не существовала Hibernate: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS users Таблица users удалена или не существовала

testcase.name: createUsersTable
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS users Таблица users удалена или не существовала Hibernate: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (id BIGINT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, last_name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, age TINYINT NOT NULL) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 Таблица users создана или уже существует

testcase.name: cleanUsersTable
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS users Таблица users удалена или не существовала Hibernate: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (id BIGINT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, last_name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, age TINYINT NOT NULL) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 Таблица users создана или уже существует Hibernate: insert into users (age, last_name, name) values (?, ?, ?) User с именем Ivan добавлен в базу данных Hibernate: delete from users Таблица users очищена Hibernate: select user0_.id as id1_0_, user0_.age as age2_0_, user0_.last_name as last_nam3_0_, user0_.name as name4_0_ from users user0_
